issue_description:
NormalDistributionImpl::cumulativeProbability(double x) throws ConvergenceException
if x deviates too much from the mean. For example, when x=+/-100, mean=0, sd=1.
Of course the value of the CDF is hard to evaluate in these cases,
but effectively it should be either zero or one.

buggy_code_comment: /** * For this disbution, X, this method returns P(X < x). * @param x the value at which the CDF is evaluated. * @return CDF evaluted at x. * @throws MathException if the algorithm fails to converge; unless * x is more than 20 standard deviations from the mean, in which case the * convergence exception is caught and 0 or 1 is returned. */
